case_title: DARRYL JONES VS. SPORTS CLUB LA et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-30-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-29-2008 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, DARRYL AS TO DEFENDANT SPORTS CLUB LA DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-16-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-15-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-01-2008

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST DARRYL JONES, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-15-2008 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-30-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA, CSR#11935. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, DARRYL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DARRYL JONES, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-30-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-15-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: VICKIE GROSS, CSR#5525. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-16-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-15-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Continued To Sep-29-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/29/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Vickie Gross, CSR#5525. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-30-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. (212)
